name: Texas Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, scald the milk. Stir in cornmeal.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from the heat. Stir in butter, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
4. In a small bowl, beat egg yolks.
5. Gradually stir in a small amount of the hot mixture into yolks; return all to the pan and mix well.
6. In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Fold egg whites into the hot mixture until well blended.
8. Pour into a greased 8 inch square baking dish.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until well puffed.
10. Use a spoon to serve. Yield: 6 servings.
